data.scene: Device Sensor Data (Motion, Activity, Battery, Connectivity, Barometer, Pedometer)
data.purpose: SensorContainer periodically collects all sensor data and sends to HA server. Includes motion activity, pedometer, battery, connectivity (SSID/BSSID/cellular), barometer, and app state sensors.
data.item: Device Sensor Data (Motion, Activity, Battery, Connectivity, Barometer, Pedometer)
